headline: Synopsys Should Benefit No Matter Who Wins The AI Race. Here’s What Explains Its Poor Stock Performance.
summary: Synopsys makes the software every chipmaker needs, so it profits regardless of who wins the AI race. Yet its stock fell after a strong quarter, and the reason isn’t obvious from the numbers alone.
